title: Powerhouse Connect runtime configuration
description: Runtime configuration loaded by Connect at boot from /powerhouse.config.json.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor autocomplete. Set to the GitHub-hosted schema URL.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Must match the SPA bundle that ships with this dist. The SPA throws on mismatch to prevent SPA/config skew.

packages.description: Powerhouse packages this Connect instance loads at runtime.

version.description: Exact version (registry providers) or omit to take latest.

provider.description: Where Connect should resolve the package from at runtime.

url.description: Override URL for non-registry providers (e.g. github tarball).

localPackage.description: Identity of the consumer project itself, captured at build time. null for Docker images and other generic deploys with no host project.

connect.description: Connect-specific UI customisations. All fields optional; omit the section entirely for default behaviour.

appName.description: Browser tab title and any in-app brand text. Defaults to 'Powerhouse Connect'.

homeBackground.description: Optional hero image on the empty home screen. Provide AVIF for the modern path and a PNG/JPG fallback.

avif.description: URL or path to AVIF asset (preferred).

png.description: URL or path to PNG/JPG fallback.

logLevel.description: Log level applied by Connect's logger at boot. Affects browser-side output only.

basePath.description: Base path Connect is mounted under (e.g. '/connect' for subpath deploys). Normalised at runtime to start and end with '/'. Defaults to the build-time BASE_URL.

packages.description: Runtime behaviour for the Connect package manager (separate from top-level `packages[]`, which lists which packages to load).

externalEnabled.description: When false, Connect refuses to load any package that wasn't bundled at build time. Affirmative replacement for the legacy PH_CONNECT_EXTERNAL_PACKAGES_DISABLED env var.

registryUrl.description: CDN endpoint Connect fetches external packages from at runtime. Supports comma-separated URLs for multi-registry setups. Environment-specific — no schema default.

allowAddDrive.description: When false, the SPA hides the 'add drive' affordance entirely (top-level). Per-section overrides live in `sections.{remote,local}.allowAdd`.

defaultDrives.description: Drives the SPA auto-connects to on first load. Each must specify a URL; name and icon are optional overrides.

preserveStrategy.description: Strategy applied when defaultDrives change between deploys. 'preserve-all' keeps user-added drives untouched; 'preserve-by-url-and-detach' detaches removed default drives. No schema default — opt-in only.

sections.description: Per-section visibility and affordance toggles. `remote` covers what was historically split into 'public' + 'cloud'; `local` is browser-local drives.

remote.description: Visibility and add/delete affordances for a drive section in the sidebar.

enabled.description: When false, the section is hidden in the sidebar.

allowAdd.description: When false, the section's 'add drive' affordance is hidden.

allowDelete.description: When false, drives in this section cannot be deleted from the UI.

local.description: Visibility and add/delete affordances for a drive section in the sidebar.

enabled.description: When false, the section is hidden in the sidebar.

allowAdd.description: When false, the section's 'add drive' affordance is hidden.

allowDelete.description: When false, drives in this section cannot be deleted from the UI.

chainId.description: CAIP-2 chain reference within the network namespace.
